title: Carry out alpaca handling and husbandry operations
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out alpaca handling and husbandry operations demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to handle alpacas

pcs.text: Discuss work requirements with supervisor and seek clarification where necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss work requirements with supervisor and seek clarification where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss work requirements with supervisor and seek clarification where necessary.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Identify, prepare and maintain alpaca handling areas, gates and access routes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, prepare and maintain alpaca handling areas, gates and access routes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, prepare and maintain alpaca handling areas, gates and access routes.

pcs.text: Prepare and use handling equipment according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and use handling equipment according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and use handling equipment according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices.

pcs.text: Check and report missing, faulty or unsafe tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and report missing, faulty or unsafe tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and report missing, faulty or unsafe tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor.

pcs.text: Locate and identify alpacas for handling according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate and identify alpacas for handling according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and identify alpacas for handling according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Observe and anticipate behavioural characteristics of alpacas and use appropriate handling methods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe and anticipate behavioural characteristics of alpacas and use appropriate handling methods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe and anticipate behavioural characteristics of alpacas and use appropriate handling methods.

pcs.text: Follow site biosecurity procedures as instructed to minimise the risk of disease
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow site biosecurity procedures as instructed to minimise the risk of disease?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow site biosecurity procedures as instructed to minimise the risk of disease.

elements.title: Handle alpacas

pcs.text: Follow procedures to control and sort alpacas safely according to workplace animal welfare practices

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out restraint procedures safely with minimum stress and discomfort to alpacas according to workplace animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Transport alpacas when required according to animal welfare practices

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport alpacas when required according to animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Monitor and anticipate alpaca behaviour during moving and handling processes to ensure wellbeing of alpacas and safety of handlers

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and anticipate alpaca behaviour during moving and handling processes to ensure wellbeing of alpacas and safety of handlers.

pcs.text: Conduct count of alpaca and record or report as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct count of alpaca and record or report as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct count of alpaca and record or report as required.

pcs.text: Identify environmental implications associated with alpaca handling and husbandry tasks and report to supervisor

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental implications associated with alpaca handling and husbandry tasks and report to supervisor.

indicators_of_strong_understanding: Demonstrates precise, contextual, technically accurate knowledge with workplace application
